Useful words

  • 刑場 けいじょう · keijou место казни
  • 刑期 けいき · keiki срок наказания
  • 刑罰 けいばつ · keibatsu (criminal) punishment
  • 減刑 げんけい · genkei (юр.) смягчение наказания
  • 酷刑 こっけい · kokkei severe punishment

Example sentences

  • 刑を見ます。I look at the kanji 刑.

What to watch

Learn 刑 through words first, then reinforce it in sentence and stroke-order practice.
